creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
Created attachment 190060
Patch for sbin/fsck_ffs/pass5.c

I propose adding a newline after every reported "CG n: BAD CHECKSUM x vs y". A newline could be undesirable with high numbers of reported cylinder groups.

I share a few virtual UFS drives between VMs running base/head and base/stable/11, and I have seen a fair share of these messages lately. The change makes the output look better, in my view.
